text: One day, a butterfly flew into a bottle. The butterfly couldn't leave. He tried and tried but couldn't escape. After several tries, he noticed a key stuck in his jar. He buzzed around buzzing until getting it out. He flew out and decided to see the world beyond his jar. The world was amazing! Days turned into weeks. He stopped buzzing around and rested with a walk. His wings began to ache. He rested and slept. The next morning, his wings were back. He decided to explore further. Suddenly, he collided smack dab into a rose bush. Pain. The next day, he felt better. But he was curious about the roses. He crawled under their petals. Delight! There were bugs in there! He spent many days poking those bugs. He enjoyed them. It was the best adventure. One day, he noticed something shiny. A ring! He snuck up and got it. Then he got married!<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
